chapter.01.title: Fallen Village
chapter.02.title: Mist Forest
chapter.03.title: Stone Canyon
chapter.04.title: Moon Lake
chapter.05.title: Burning Desert
chapter.06.title: Thunder Peaks
chapter.07.title: Frozen Palace
chapter.08.title: Abyss Rift
chapter.09.title: Heavenly Gate
chapter.10.title: Void Throne
story.ch01.slide01: When the jade pulse faded, you understood — the village did not fall by accident.
story.ch01.slide02: Spirits whispered of a seal broken beneath the ruined shrine, and a path leading into the mist.
story.ch01.slide03: You clasp the jade orb. The Dao stirs — the Mist Forest awaits those who dare follow.
story.ch02.slide01: A fox spirit watches from the fog, measuring your resolve.
story.ch02.slide02: It vanishes toward the stone canyons — another trial begins.
story.ch03.slide01: Bandit blades break against your spirit. The canyon opens beyond.
story.ch04.slide01: An ancient seal cracks beneath the lake's reflection.
story.ch04.slide02: Heat rises from the southern dunes.
story.ch05.slide01: Survival in the burning desert forges your will like iron.
story.ch05.slide02: Thunder rolls from the peaks ahead.
story.ch06.slide01: Lightning answers your step — the storm recognizes you.
story.ch06.slide02: Frost crowns the palace on the northern ridge.
story.ch07.slide01: A forgotten queen's echo lingers in the ice halls.
story.ch07.slide02: The abyss rift tears open beneath your feet.
story.ch08.slide01: Corruption writhes at the edge of the void — yet you stand unbowed.
story.ch08.slide02: Celestial gates shimmer above the clouds.
story.ch09.slide01: Guardians of the gate test your cultivated heart.
story.ch09.slide02: The Void Throne waits at the end of all paths.
story.ch10.slide01: At the throne of the Dao, you see the journey and the destination as one.
story.ch10.slide02: The void ascends — and your legend is only beginning.
